name: Swedish Ginger Cookies (Pepparkakor)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat molasses in a small saucepan until boiling. Boil for 1 minute.
2. Add sugar and butter, stirring until the butter is melted. Allow to cool.
3. Beat in the egg.
4. Sift together flour, salt, baking soda, ginger, and cinnamon.
5. Mix the sifted ingredients into the molasses mixture thoroughly.
6. Cover the bowl tightly and chill overnight.
7. Roll out a portion of the dough on a lightly floured pastry cloth. Roll until thin.
8. Cut into desired shapes.
9. Bake in a moderate oven (350°F) for 6 to 8 minutes.
Yield: 10 dozen cookies
Note: The dough may be shaped into a roll and wrapped in waxed paper. Chill thoroughly overnight or longer. Slice thinly and bake in a moderate oven (350°F). Store in an air-tight container; allow flavor to "ripen".
